blocks.text: Nine points or three: Arsenal visit the Etihad in a title-defining clash
Arsenal lead by six — a win today stretches the gap to nine and puts Arteta's side firmly in control. City win and it's three: a title fight alive until the final whistle of the season.
🏎️ 17:00 — Bahrain GP Round 4. Antonelli leads Russell by 9pts as the 2026 title picture sharpens.
🎮 Mon 02:00 — IEM Rio 2026 CS2 Major opens. Norwegian legend rain chasing the biggest title of his career.
